FFmpeg distribution notice
==========================

BookVoice bundles unmodified FFmpeg and FFprobe 8.1.1 executables for local
media inspection, conversion, and remuxing. BookVoice invokes these programs
as separate processes; they are not loaded as application libraries.

The bundled Windows full build is provided by Gyan Doshi (gyan.dev) and is
licensed under GNU GPL version 3. The complete license text is installed as
tools/ffmpeg/LICENSE.txt. FFmpeg source for this exact version is available at:

  https://ffmpeg.org/releases/ffmpeg-8.1.1.tar.xz

Build-provider source and build scripts are available at:

  https://github.com/GyanD/codexffmpeg

FFmpeg is a trademark of Fabrice Bellard, originator of the FFmpeg project.
The FFmpeg project and build provider do not endorse BookVoice.
